CustomObject.description: Tracks PSA-NEPA platform maturity against the 10 CEQ Minimum Functional Requirements (MFRs) from the Permitting Technology Action Plan (May 2025). One record per MFR. Agencies must self-assess and submit maturity plans by August 28, 2025. Using CMT rather than a transactional object because maturity is platform capability state — updateable without code change.
CustomObject.label: NEPA MFR Assessment

fields.description: CEQ MFR number (1–10) from the Permitting Technology Action Plan.
fields.label: MFR Number

fields.description: Official MFR name as defined in the CEQ Permitting Technology Action Plan (May 2025).
fields.label: MFR Name

fields.description: Current platform maturity level as defined by CEQ: Leading-Edge (fully implemented), Emerging (partially implemented), Not-Started.
fields.label: Current Maturity

fields.description: Target maturity level for the next planning period.
fields.label: Target Maturity

fields.description: Description of the Salesforce platform feature(s) delivering this MFR, with MFR citation.
fields.label: Platform Feature
